requirement_topic.en: F-gas Regulation and Dutch F-gas Implementation — Refrigerant Restrictions, Phase-down, and STEK Certification
requirement_topic.zh: 氟化气体法规及荷兰实施规定——制冷剂限制、削减计划与STEK认证
requirement_topic.zht: 氟化氣體法規及荷蘭實施規定——制冷劑限制、削減計畫與STEK認證

summary.en: F-gas Regulation (EU) 2024/573 prohibits or restricts placing equipment containing certain HFCs on the market. Heat pumps using R410A (GWP ~2088) face restrictions from 2025 onwards. The Netherlands implements the F-gas Regulation via the Besluit gefluoreerde broeikasgassen en ozonafbrekende stoffen. Technicians handling F-gas refrigerants must hold a STEK (Stichting Erkenningsregeling Koude en Klimaattechniek) certificate, which is the Dutch F-gas technician certification under EU Regulation (EU) 2015/2067. ILT enforces F-gas handling compliance. Equipment containing F-gases must be labelled with the refrigerant name and GWP value.
summary.zh: 氟化气体法规（EU）2024/573禁止或限制含特定氢氟碳化物（HFC）设备的市场投放。使用R410A（GWP约2088）的热泵自2025年起面临限制。荷兰通过《氟化温室气体及消耗臭氧层物质法令》实施F-gas法规。处理F-gas制冷剂的技术人员须持有STEK（制冷与空调认证委员会）证书，即依据欧盟法规（EU）2015/2067颁发的荷兰F-gas技术人员认证。ILT负责执行F-gas处理合规要求。含F-gas的设备须标注制冷剂名称及GWP值。
summary.zht: 氟化氣體法規（EU）2024/573禁止或限制含特定氫氟碳化物（HFC）設備的市場投放。使用R410A（GWP約2088）的熱泵自2025年起面臨限制。荷蘭通過《氟化溫室氣體及消耗臭氧層物質法令》實施F-gas法規。處理F-gas制冷劑的技術人員須持有STEK（制冷與空調認證委員會）證書，即依據歐盟法規（EU）2015/2067頒發的荷蘭F-gas技術人員認證。ILT負責執行F-gas處理合規要求。含F-gas的設備須標注制冷劑名稱及GWP值。

standards_or_laws: Besluit gefluoreerde broeikasgassen en ozonafbrekende stoffen (NL implementation)

summary.en: GB/T 7725 covers refrigerant labelling requirements. China has no equivalent GWP-based phase-down quota system matching EU F-gas Regulation (EU) 2024/573. R410A remains widely used in Chinese air-source heat pumps. China does not have a national technician certification system for F-gas handling equivalent to EU/Dutch STEK certification.
summary.zh: GB/T 7725规定了制冷剂标识要求。中国目前没有与欧盟氟化气体法规（EU）2024/573对应的基于GWP的削减配额制度。R410A在中国空气源热泵中仍广泛使用。中国没有等同于欧盟/荷兰STEK认证的国家F-gas处理技术人员认证制度。
summary.zht: GB/T 7725規定了制冷劑標識要求。中國目前沒有與歐盟氟化氣體法規（EU）2024/573對應的基於GWP的削減配額制度。R410A在中國空氣源熱泵中仍廣泛使用。中國沒有等同於歐盟/荷蘭STEK認證的國家F-gas處理技術人員認證制度。

gap.en: R410A-charged heat pumps face EU market restrictions from 2025 and are not legal to place on the Dutch market. Dutch F-gas implementation requires STEK-certified technicians for installation and servicing — Chinese manufacturer technician qualifications are not recognised. Equipment GWP labelling must comply with EU/NL requirements. Importers must verify their refrigerant is within the EU F-gas quota system and that all handling is performed by STEK-certified personnel.
gap.zh: 充注R410A的热泵自2025年起面临欧盟市场限制，在荷兰市场投放不合法。荷兰F-gas实施规定要求安装和维修须由STEK认证技术人员进行——中国制造商的技术人员资质不被认可。设备GWP标识须符合欧盟/荷兰要求。进口商须核实制冷剂在欧盟F-gas配额体系内，且所有处理操作均由STEK认证人员执行。
gap.zht: 充注R410A的熱泵自2025年起面臨歐盟市場限制，在荷蘭市場投放不合法。荷蘭F-gas實施規定要求安裝和維修須由STEK認證技術人員進行——中國製造商的技術人員資質不被認可。設備GWP標識須符合歐盟/荷蘭要求。進口商須核實制冷劑在歐盟F-gas配額體系內，且所有處理操作均由STEK認證人員執行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU/NL F-gas Regulation; STEK technician certification mandatory for handling; ILT enforces)
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable (no equivalent GWP restriction or technician certification system in China)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap for R410A units — EU/NL market placement restricted from 2025. Additional Dutch gap: STEK technician certification mandatory for installation and servicing; Chinese technician qualifications not recognised in the Netherlands.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R410A机组存在重大合规差距——自2025年起受欧盟/荷兰市场投放限制。额外荷兰差距：安装和维修须强制持有STEK技术人员认证；中国技术人员资质在荷兰不被认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R410A機組存在重大合規差距——自2025年起受歐盟/荷蘭市場投放限制。額外荷蘭差距：安裝和維修須強制持有STEK技術人員認證；中國技術人員資質在荷蘭不被認可。

requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Safety — Flammable Refrigerant Handling (EN 378 Series) and Dutch Installation Context
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂安全——可燃制冷剂处理要求（EN 378系列）与荷兰安装环境
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷劑安全——可燃制冷劑處理要求（EN 378系列）與荷蘭安裝環境

summary.en: EU legal obligations for flammable refrigerant heat-pump circuits come from applicable legislation, including Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU where pressure, volume, and fluid-group thresholds are met. EN 378 series and EN 14276 are voluntary harmonised standards that may support presumption of conformity. In the Netherlands, the widespread adoption of R290 (propane, A3 flammable) heat pumps for domestic heating is increasing; installers and manufacturers must be aware that Dutch housing stock — predominantly older canal houses and terraced homes — may present confined indoor spaces where EN 378-1 flammable refrigerant charge limits per room volume are critical compliance items. STEK certification is required for F-gas and natural refrigerant handling.
summary.zh: 可燃制冷剂热泵回路的欧盟法律义务来自适用法规，包括在达到压力、容积和流体组别阈值时适用的压力设备指令2014/68/EU。EN 378系列和EN 14276是支持符合性推定的自愿协调标准。在荷兰，用于家庭供暖的R290（丙烷，A3可燃）热泵日益普及；安装商和制造商须注意，荷兰住房存量——主要为较旧的运河房屋和联排住宅——可能存在有限的室内空间，EN 378-1中按房间容积计算的可燃制冷剂充注量限制是关键合规事项。处理F-gas和天然制冷剂须持有STEK认证。
summary.zht: 可燃制冷劑熱泵迴路的歐盟法律義務來自適用法規，包括在達到壓力、容積和流體組別閾值時適用的壓力設備指令2014/68/EU。EN 378系列和EN 14276是支持符合性推定的自願協調標準。在荷蘭，用於家庭供暖的R290（丙烷，A3可燃）熱泵日益普及；安裝商和製造商須注意，荷蘭住房存量——主要為較舊的運河房屋和聯排住宅——可能存在有限的室內空間，EN 378-1中按房間容積計算的可燃制冷劑充注量限制是關鍵合規事項。處理F-gas和天然制冷劑須持有STEK認證。

standards_or_laws: STEK certification (NL F-gas and natural refrigerant technician scheme)

summary.en: GB 9237-2008 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems) is China's national adoption of ISO 5149:1993. Charge limits for flammable refrigerants, indoor ventilation thresholds, and system documentation requirements differ from EN 378. China does not have an equivalent STEK-style technician certification scheme for residential heat pump installation.
summary.zh: GB 9237-2008（制冷系统安全要求）是中国对ISO 5149:1993的国家采标。可燃制冷剂充注量限制、室内通风阈值和系统文件要求与EN 378存在差异。中国没有等同于STEK的住宅热泵安装技术人员认证制度。
summary.zht: GB 9237-2008（制冷系統安全要求）是中國對ISO 5149:1993的國家採標。可燃制冷劑充注量限制、室內通風閾值和系統文件要求與EN 378存在差異。中國沒有等同於STEK的住宅熱泵安裝技術人員認證制度。

gap.en: PED classification must be checked for the refrigerant circuit. EN 378 charge-limit, ventilation, and leak-detection methods differ from GB 9237. Dutch-specific gap: R290 charge limits per EN 378-1 are particularly critical in the confined spaces of Dutch housing; product documentation and installation instructions must be provided in Dutch and must specify compliance with EN 378 room-volume charge limits. STEK-certified technicians are required for installation.
gap.zh: 须检查制冷剂回路的PED分类。EN 378充注量限制、通风和泄漏检测方法与GB 9237不同。荷兰特定差距：EN 378-1规定的R290充注量限制在荷兰住宅的有限空间中尤为关键；产品文件和安装说明须以荷兰语提供，并须规定符合EN 378房间容积充注量限制。安装须由STEK认证技术人员执行。
gap.zht: 須檢查制冷劑迴路的PED分類。EN 378充注量限制、通風和洩漏檢測方法與GB 9237不同。荷蘭特定差距：EN 378-1規定的R290充注量限制在荷蘭住宅的有限空間中尤為關鍵；產品文件和安裝說明須以荷蘭語提供，並須規定符合EN 378房間容積充注量限制。安裝須由STEK認證技術人員執行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: PED applies where thresholds are met; EN 378 voluntary but critical for Dutch housing context; STEK certification mandatory for installation technicians

source.publisher: STEK — Stichting Erkenningsregeling Koude en Klimaattechniek

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — assess mandatory PED applicability first; Dutch housing context makes EN 378 R290 charge limits a critical practical requirement; STEK technician certification is mandatory for installation and servicing in the Netherlands.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——须先评估强制性PED适用性；荷兰住宅环境使EN 378 R290充注量限制成为关键实际要求；荷兰的安装和维修须强制持有STEK技术人员认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——須先評估強制性PED適用性；荷蘭住宅環境使EN 378 R290充注量限制成為關鍵實際要求；荷蘭的安裝和維修須強制持有STEK技術人員認證。
